title: StorageNoteAppendResult
description:
Return type for `com.nexus.storage::note_append`. Mirror of
[`crate::FileMetadata`] — same shape as `write_file`'s return so a
caller can use either handler interchangeably.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the post-append file content.

modified_at.description: Unix timestamp of the post-append modification.
